description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is clad in horizontal siding, painted white, and the roof is finished with gray shingles. The front facade includes a set of three windows and a central entrance, while the sides and rear have arched and rectangular windows arranged in a simple, functional pattern. The house sits on a raised foundation with stonework visible at the base, and a wide driveway leads up to the porch. The surrounding yard is grassy, bordered by a sidewalk and a paved street. The overall design is compact and symmetrical, with clean lines and a welcoming entryway.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and stone foundation, surrounded by a grassy yard and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, three front windows, central entrance, stone foundation, and driveway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gable roof, a single arched window, and the grassy backyard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the horizontal siding, arched windows, and the extension of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side entrance steps, window arrangement, and driveway connection.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with arched side windows
